_description: Crew Psychology Model retroactive enrichment - adds psychology hazards to existing frames

_physics_added.third_quarter_syndrome: Peak psychological stress at 75% mission duration
_physics_added.circadian_disruption: Mars sol drift causes cumulative sleep/cognitive degradation
_physics_added.crew_conflicts: Small group dynamics create mission-threatening interpersonal conflicts
_physics_added.communication_isolation: Mars-Earth delay variations increase psychological isolation
_physics_added.psychological_breakdown: Individual stress cascades affect entire crew productivity

hazards.description: Peak psychological stress at 67% mission progress (approaching third quarter)
Peak third-quarter psychological stress at 75% mission progress
Long-term psychological adaptation to Mars environment begins
Mars-Earth communication delay reaches 20+ minutes, increasing isolation
Small group dynamics stress leads to interpersonal conflicts
Cumulative Mars sol drift causes severe circadian disruption

_enrichment_strategy: Retroactive psychology hazards added to existing frames to create cumulative psychological pressure throughout mission timeline. Third-quarter effects peak around sol 500 (75% of 669-sol mission).
